mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sm_blog_tone (member_id, style, characteristics, sample_text) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{style}, #{characteristics, typeHandler=com.crown.common.typehandler.JsonListStringTypeHandler}, #{sampleText})

INSERT INTO sm_blog_post (member_id, subject, media_urls, additional_info, platform, status, scheduled_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{subject}, #{mediaUrls, typeHandler=com.crown.common.typehandler.JsonListStringTypeHandler}, #{additionalInfo}, #{platform}, #{status}, #{scheduledAt})
mapper.select: SELECT post_id, member_id, subject, content, media_urls, additional_info, platform, status, error_message, published_url, scheduled_at, published_at, created_at, updated_at FROM sm_blog_post WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE sm_blog_post SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE sm_blog_post SET published_url = #{publishedUrl}, status = #{status}, published_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE sm_blog_post SET scheduled_at = #{scheduledAt}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT post_id, member_id, subject, content, media_urls, additional_info, platform, status, error_message, published_url, scheduled_at, published_at, created_at, updated_at FROM sm_blog_post WHERE status = 'scheduled' AND scheduled_at <= NOW() ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC
